summary: The P2P stream divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in handshake, read/write polling, decompression, disconnect, and ping/pong decode paths; no P2P stream behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 151: M	crates/net/eth-wire/src/p2pstream.rs.

The isolated patch only adds semicolons to existing MessageTooBig, MismatchedProtocolVersion, disconnecting, empty message, disconnect reason, reserved ID, decompressed message, ping timeout, flush, send buffer, and snappy ping/pong decode returns.
No handshake validation, payload size limit, disconnect decoding, snappy decompression, message ID classification, outbound capacity, flush behavior, or ping/pong payload validation changed.
